documentation.file_docstring: Validate webhook token using constant-time comparison. Prevents timing attacks that could leak token bytes.
inline_comments: Use HMAC to normalize lengths before comparison,
preventing timing side-channel on token length.
Check if a user ID is in the allowed list. Allowlist mode must be explicit; empty lists should not match any user.
Resolve DM authorization for a sender across all DM policy modes. Keeps policy semantics in one place so webhook/startup behavior stays consistent.
Sanitize user input to prevent prompt injection attacks. Filters known dangerous patterns and truncates long messages.
Sliding window rate limiter per user ID.
